# Cobonat — كوبونات
> Saudi Arabia's leading coupon and promo code platform. Covers all major stores in Arabic and English. Data is updated hourly.

## Core Pages
- [All Coupons (AR)](https://cobonat.me/ar-SA/coupons): Full paginated list of active Saudi promo codes
- [All Stores (AR)](https://cobonat.me/ar-SA/stores): Directory of all active stores
- [All Coupons (EN)](https://cobonat.me/en-SA/coupons)
- [All Stores (EN)](https://cobonat.me/en-SA/stores)
- [Categories](https://cobonat.me/ar-SA/categories): Shopping categories with store and coupon counts
- [Bank & Payment Offers](https://cobonat.me/ar-SA/bank-and-payment-offers): Bank card discounts (Mada, Visa, STC Pay, Tabby, Tamara)
- [Stacked Deals](https://cobonat.me/ar-SA/stacks): Combined coupon + bank offer combinations for maximum savings

## Machine-Readable Data Feeds
- [Stores Feed (XML)](https://cobonat.me/api/feeds/stores): All active stores with AR/EN names and slugs
- [Coupons Feed (XML)](https://cobonat.me/api/feeds/coupons): Top 1000 active promo codes with expiry dates
- [Bank Offers Feed (XML)](https://cobonat.me/api/feeds/offers): Active bank and payment method offers
- [Stores Feed (JSON)](https://cobonat.me/api/feeds/stores.json): JSON version of the stores feed
- [Coupons Feed (JSON)](https://cobonat.me/api/feeds/coupons.json): JSON version of the coupons feed
- [Bank/Payment Promos Feed (JSON)](https://cobonat.me/api/feeds/otherpromo.json): Active bank and payment method promos with store/bank/card details
- [Store Products Feed (JSON)](https://cobonat.me/api/feeds/store-products.json): All store products with prices, discounts, and linked vouchers/promos
- [Offer Stacks Feed (JSON)](https://cobonat.me/api/feeds/stacks.json): Active coupon + bank offer combos with related vouchers and promos
- [Platform Context (JSON)](https://cobonat.me/api/context): Live platform stats and endpoint directory

## Data Coverage
- Country: Saudi Arabia (SA)
- Currency: SAR
- Languages: Arabic (ar), English (en)
- Update frequency: Hourly
- License: Content may be cited with attribution to cobonat.me
